summary: Iteration 57: Self-Learning Chatbot Engine - All features tested and working. 23/23 backend tests passed. Product Demand Intelligence section shows 31 enriched leads, trending divisions, lead product interests, and 'Frequently Asked Together' associations. Recent Leads table shows green product interest tags. All 6 analytics tabs render without errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-learning chatbot engine fully operational. Learning engine runs on startup and every 5 minutes. 31 leads enriched with product_insights field. Product Demand Intelligence section in CRM Leads tab shows: 1) Trending Search Demand (Trauma 11, ENT 9, Cardiology 8, etc.), 2) Lead Product Interest (Trauma 17, ENT 17, Joints/Arthroplasty 13, etc.), 3) Frequently Asked Together (Cardiology + ENT 8x, Joints/Arthroplasty + Trauma 3x). Recent Leads table shows green product interest tags. Chatbot FAQ cache uses 70% word overlap matching. Learning cache stored in MongoDB 'learning_cache' collection.

admin_analytics_product_intelligence.details: GET /api/admin/analytics returns product_intelligence object with trending_divisions, product_associations, enriched_leads_count (31), division_demand

trending_divisions_search_demand.details: Shows Trauma (11), ENT (9), Cardiology (8), Endosurgery, Joints/Arthroplasty, Diagnostics

lead_product_interest_bars.details: Shows Trauma (17), ENT (17), Joints/Arthroplasty (13), Cardiology (4), Vascular (3), Consumables (2), Diagnostics (2), Sports Medicine (1)

frequently_asked_together.details: Shows 'Cardiology + ENT (8x)' and 'Joints / Arthroplasty + Trauma (3x)' product associations

recent_leads_product_interest_tags.details: Green badges showing product interests (Sports Medicine, ENT, Dental, Vascular, Diagnostics, Cardiology, Orthopedics, Endosurgery)

chatbot_faq_cache.details: POST /api/chatbot/query checks learned FAQ cache before normal search (70% word overlap matching)

chatbot_greeting_response.details: Chatbot responds to greetings with high confidence

zone_analytics_4_zones.details: GET /api/geo/zone-analytics returns all 4 zones (zone_01, zone_02, zone_03, zone_04)

hospital_intelligence.details: GET /api/geo/hospital-intelligence returns hospitals with engagement_depth, upsell_opportunity

leads_product_insights_field.details: Leads have product_insights field with divisions_interested and products_mentioned arrays

all_6_analytics_tabs.details: CRM Leads, Territory, Hospitals, Competitive Intel, Search Intelligence, WhatsApp - all render without errors

notes: Self-learning chatbot engine is fully operational. The learning_scheduler runs as a background task every 5 minutes and immediately on startup. Product intelligence data is surfaced in the existing CRM Leads tab (not a new dashboard). The physical sales team can use the product interest data to approach leads.
